naturalist.midnightconfig.elephantRemove: §8§o[?]§7§o If set to 'Yes', Mammoths will not spawn, and existing Mammoths will be removed.

naturalist.midnightconfig.elephantSpawnM: §8§o[?]§7§o The minimum number of Mammoths that can spawn in a group.
§8§o[?]§7§o The maximum number of Mammoths that can spawn in a group.
